titleStmt.title: SII 24.420: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 420. (A.R. No. 37 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Records that Avasaram Mallarasayyaṉ, son of Āṉatalai Śaṅkaraśar, having found that some of the Tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam lands lying waste had now begun to yield more than the expected yield due to the broadening of the Peruvaḷavaṉvāykkāl, arranged for offerings of 67 dishes of food both to the god Raṅganātha and the goddess Nāchchiyār in the name of the king, queen Varadāchchi Ammaṉ and prince Veṅkaṭādrirāya. The dishes were allotted to the night feeding at the choultry of Śaṅkaraśayyaṉ, to some Brāhmaṇas, Śūdras and Paradēśis and to the watersheds at the northern and southern gates. The date viz. Śaka 1457, Manmatha, Mēsha, śu. 2, Monday, Rōhiṇi corresponds to 1535 A.D., April 5, Monday, śu. 3 (not 2). ·71, f.d.t. ·48.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī śrīmat mahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīra pratāpa śrīvīra Acyutadevamahārāyar pṛthuvirājyam paṇṇiaruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 7- Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa maṉmathasamvatsarattu meṣanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu dvitiyaiyum somavāramum peṟṟa rohiṇinakṣatranāḷ teṉ karai pāṇḍikulāśani vaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkan ti
ruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevaṟkku śāṇḍilya gotrattu Āślāyanasūtrattu Āṉatalai caṅkaracar putran Avasaramallaracaiyaṉeṉ śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭutta paṭi . cuvāmi Accutate(y)vamahārāyar Upaiyam Āka perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthade var(ṟ)kku Amutu ceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa nāḷ Oṉṟukku taḷikai muppatu . Ituvum Ammaṉ varatācciammaṉ Upaiyam Ākak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa taḷikai Irupatu .
Ituvum kumārar veṅkaṭādrirāyar Upaiyam Āka Amutu ceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa taḷikai patiṉeḻu Āka nāḷ Oṉṟukku Amutu ceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa taḷikai 6 10 7 Intat taḷikai 6 10 7 kkum Amutupaṭi paruppu Amutu neyyamutu kaṟi Amutu campāram Uḷppaṭṭa vakaikku vaṭakarai maḻanāṭu peruvaḷavaṉ vāykkāl Ekkal pāñcu meṭuṭṭuRead meṭiṭṭukiḻaimuṟicirmai pāḻākaiyil Inta varuṣam mallaracayyaṉ peruvaḷavaṉ vāykkāl pūrvattilum vāḷamāka vāykkāl Akalam Iṭṭu veṭṭuvikkaiyil pūrvattil tiruviṭaiyāṭṭac cirmaiyi
l pāḻāka Irunta kiṟāmaṅkaḷil Inta varuṣam tiruttu Āṉa nilattil Utaiyamum tiru UṭaiyāṭṭaRead tiruviṭaiyāṭṭaccimai vaṭakarai kiṟāmaṅkaḷukku piṟākku naṭappurekai niṅkalaāka Inta varuṣam vāykkāl veṭṭukaiyil rekai Atikam Ākak kaṇṭu kaṭṭina Utaiyattilum Āka varuṣam ( varuṣam) toṟum Inta Utaiyaṅkoṇṭe nāḷ Oṉṟukku Amutu ceytaruḷak kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa taḷikai Aṟupattu Eḻukku Amutupaṭi paruppu Amutu neyyamutu kaṟiamutu Uḷppaṭṭa vakai nāḷtoṟum śrīpaṇṭārattile viṭṭu candrātittya varaiyum Amu
tu ceytaruḷakkaṭavatākavum § Inta śilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikkuk kovilk kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyar Eḻuttu § Inta taḷikaiyil cuvāmi Accutateva mahārāyar taṉmam Āka caṅkaracayyaṉ kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa Irāccattirattukku nāḷ 1- kku tiruvitiyile brāhmaṇaṟkkum cūttiraṟkkum parateciyaḷukkum kaṭṭaḷai taḷikai pattu vaṭakku vācalt taṇṇirpantalukku taḷikai . 3 . teṟku vācalt taṇṇir pantalukku ta
ḷikai 3 . Ākat taḷikai . 10 6 . Intat taḷikai patiṉāṟum nāḷtoṟum naṭakkak kaṭava tākavum . Intat taṉmattukku yātoruvar Ahitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ gaṅkaik karaiyile kārāmpacuvum koṉṟu taṉ mātāpitāvaiyum koṉṟa pāpattil pokak kaṭavārkaḷākavum §
Digital edition of SII 24.420 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
